name: Image Sourcing
description: Validates that all images are sourced, URLs extracted and verified, licenses confirmed, and image data is ready for implementation. Checks both audit documentation AND the actual images.ts implementation file.

any_of.description: Image research audit with sourced images and license verification
Image documentation with sourced images and license verification
Image migration manifest with URLs and attribution
TypeScript image data with URLs and attribution

validations.description: At least one image sourcing artifact must exist
Image audit must not contain unlicensed assets
Image audit should not have pending sourcing tasks
Image audit must not have FAIL status in frontmatter
images.ts must exist with verified Wikimedia Commons direct URLs (not file page URLs)
images.ts must NOT contain thumbnail URLs (/commons/thumb/) — use direct image URLs only
images.ts must contain at least one properly-hashed Wikimedia Commons direct URL (format: /commons/{hash1}/{hash2}/filename.ext)
images.ts must contain at least 5 verified direct image URLs (photorealistic essays require substantial photography)
All image URLs in images.ts must return HTTP 2xx — verifies URLs are not broken (404), not thumbnail redirects, and not file-page HTML

required_skills.name: Image URL Extraction
required_skills.reason: Agent MUST follow the extraction procedure in SKILL.md to obtain direct image URLs. Never guess Wikimedia hash paths — always extract from the file page using curl + grep or the Wikimedia API.

notes: G4.5 validates both the audit documentation AND the actual images.ts implementation file. The images.ts file must contain direct Wikimedia Commons URLs (with proper MD5 hash paths like /a/a1/), NOT thumbnail URLs (/commons/thumb/) which may 404. The min_regex_count check ensures a minimum viable set of images. SVG-only essays may set images.ts to export an empty IMAGES object and document 'No External Images Required' in the audit. [UNLICENSED] is a hard fail; [PENDING] is a warning.
